indicators.name: white armchair
indicators.rationale: The white armchair is not suitable for computer work as it lacks a flat surface for a laptop or monitor.

indicators.name: couch
indicators.rationale: The couch is not suitable for computer work as it lacks a flat surface for a laptop or monitor.

indicators.name: ceiling lights
indicators.rationale: The ceiling lights may create glare on computer screens.

indicators.name: window
indicators.rationale: The window can be a source of distraction and potential glare.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The presence of a white armchair and a couch makes it difficult to set up a proper workstation. The ceiling lights and window may create glare on computer screens, further reducing the suitability for focused work.
